allow: PowerShell(wsl -e bash -c "echo 'WSL ready'; whoami; uname -r; echo HOME=$HOME")

PowerShell(wsl -e bash -c "nohup bash -c 'HUNI_DIR=/mnt/c/Users/Lee/Desktop/Huni INCLUDE_K3S=0 bash /mnt/c/Users/Lee/Desktop/Huni/misc/gather-all.sh > /tmp/gather-all.log 2>&1; echo EXIT_CODE=\\$? >> /tmp/gather-all.log' &")
